feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Parked Invoice for specific suppliers
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to select some problematic suplliers and when Im posting an invoice frm these suppliers it should goes parked, can I do that?

entry.title: Is "Amount Split" tab available in the Fiori screen of SAP s/4hana public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I would like to know if the "Amount Split" tab is also available in the application Create Supplier Invoice app in SAP S/4hana public Cloud? 

Thanks!

Regards

Meri

entry.title: In Public Cloud, can I generate Defect automatically for the Inspected Unit that was rejected?
entry.content:
We cannot use Quantity Based Inspection Points in Public Cloud (Feb 2025). We thus create a 100% Inspection and SAP allow us to record a result for each Unit.
I want to automatically generate a Defect when a Unit is Rejected. The problem is that SAP creates the Defect when the average of the Characteristic is outside specification (Rejected).
Any idea what I can do to generate a Defect per rejected Unit?
Using MIC with 92 Major characteristic, Defect active, Defect Coding added, in Routing (03 Insp Lot) with Sampling Procedure 100% Inspection. Defect Class = 92 Major defect.

I would like a Defect to be created for Unit 3. If the average result for Char 20 is outside specifications, it creates a Defect.

Thanx in advance
Corne

entry.title: Update procedure for SAP Public Cloud version and tool to validate the business influence
entry.content:
Recently, the SAP public cloud has released new version 2502. According to the updates, I have some doubts:

1. What is the standard procedure to update the system?

Usually if we need to change the system, we need to change the configuration from customizing system, to test system and then to production system.

Do the SAP version updates also follow the same sequence and generate Customizing Transports? 

 

2. Is there any tool to validate or test the business influence caused by the updates?

If the SAP version updates bring some changes which may have impact on our current business, how can we test or validate these influence? Is there any recommended tool? 

I am looking forward to reply. Thank you for all answers in advance.

entry.title: [R] APP职能范围-实际丢失（R）
entry.content:
系统周末完成升级之后，发现APP职能范围-实际找不到了，但是此前这个APP并没有打弃用标识，麻烦老师帮忙看一下。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to create Inbound Delivery and HU with API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we recieve packed products from Subcontracting Packers and recieve ASN info to create Inbound Delivery and Handling Units (Nested).

 

we have checked several APIs and tried the below API (Pack Products into Handling Units in WM-Managed Storage Location )

POST <host>/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_handlingunit/srvd_a2x/sap/handlingunit/0001/HandlingUnitItem
X-CSRF-Token: kF1uaxWzKBzvw8_6BXafug==
{
"Warehouse": "1050",
"HandlingUnitExternalID": "810003978",
"StockItemUUID": "b7036e63-34a6-1eee-91de-f47ede0461cd",
"HandlingUnitQuantity": 3,
"HandlingUnitQuantityUnit": "EA",
"HandlingUnitAltUnitOfMeasure": "EA"
}

 

But the API ends up in error /SCWM/L3/104 - Stock for required data does not exist. we are unable to recieve ASN with HUs and createInbound Delivery with HU in the warehouse .

How to Restrict Access to Business Partner Bank Details in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: USER DETAILS IN SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi Sapian,

Please mention the table or CD views where I can see the user details, such as his User ID, Username, and email address. 

Environment: SAP Public cloud (not integrated with SuccessFactors)

Regards

entry.title: Activation of Business Process(Scope Item) in CBC
entry.content:
What are the available scope item's and How to activate a scope item in CBC

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud TM and WM Integration for Inbound Purchase Order
entry.content:
I'm looking for some detailed information for when SAP is planning on delivering a solution to integrate purchase order/inbound deliveries through the advanced shipping and receiving functionality in S/4HANA Public Cloud. I've tried looking at the product roadmap, but I didn't see any references for this particular scenario.

Has anyone else faced this restriction? What other types of solutions did you recommend for your customers who are trying to utilize both TM and WM throughout their operations?

entry.title: Restrictions in app Profit Centers - Actuals
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We would like to implement restrictions in the Profit Centers - Actuals app to ensure that users can only view data for the company code in which they are employed.

In our setup, we have one profit center assigned to all company codes. However, we want to restrict users so that:

  • Some users can only see data for a specific company code (e.g., Germany).
  • Others can only see data for a different company code (e.g., Switzerland).

The relevant role for this app is Divisional Accountant.

Is it possible to enforce such restrictions, and if so, what would be the recommended approach?

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Print HU label at Product WT confirmation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We have a business requirement to print HU labels after picking and packing. We want to print the label after the material has been committed to the Handling Unit (not at HU creation).

Looking at OPD, I don't see an available option to represent this. It looks like there is a flag for 'HU Task exists'. This should work, as when the material is committed to the HU, it also creates the drop off HU Task. However, this doesn't seem to trigger our outputs.

Is there an OPD trigger for Handling Unit output type to trigger HU label creation at product WT confirmation?

entry.title: Analytics Cloud Connetion to S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hey all

Im currently Facing an issue, while setting up the Live Connetion from an SAC to my S4 Public Cloud.

I have done the setup according to this guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html?locale=en

While now saving the Live Connection is SAC, i can see the following error within the Developer Tools:

 

 

invalid_grant,
Provided authorization grant is invalid.Exception was The assertion has already been consumed.For more information,
consult the kernel traces or the OAuth 2.0 trouble shooting SAP note 1688545

 

 

Within the Connectivity Trace i have the following Data:

 

Does anyone have an Idea, on what could be the Problem?

Best Regards 🙂

entry.title: How to create worker without creating a Business user?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

For about a week we've been experiencing an issue in our S/4 system where Business Partners are being created with Masterdata from SAP SuccessFactors without a discernible reason why.

There appears to be a job that's running overnight using the SAP System Processing user. Our guess is that this originates from SAP Master Data Integration, but there have been no changes in that system.

Could you please advise? 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Special stock revaluation issue
entry.content:
Special stock with indicate E sales order stock do not do revaluation when standard price changed.


Please advise how to let special stock also be revaluated 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need Value for Help in Adapt filter for custom field in Custom Analytical Queries
entry.content:
HI SAP Experts,

I have created Custom field Supplier/Employee as Code list of cds view type I_SupplierVH for Create supplier invoice and enabled that field in I_JournalEntryItem cds view. I am getting value for help in Create supplier invoice App but if I create custom report through custom cds view. There in analytical queries I have added Supplier/Employee i have added in adapt filters but there value for help is not coming, even in fields also supplier code is coming but supplier name is not coming.

I need either value for help in adapt filters or in down fields there in filter i need both code and description of supplier.

Kindly, requesting you to check on this.

This is in adapt filters in Custom analytical Queries

 

This is filter in row in Cutom analytical queries

This is in create supplier invoice app


Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: Constraint net cannot be deleted (PMEVC)
entry.content:
Constraint net cannot be deleted

Freitag, 31. Januar 2025

 

Usecase for deleting the constraint net:

 

First create a dependency net (aka constraint net aka CN)

 

App: PMEVC (GUI-App)

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Save

 

 

 Then create constraint into the new CN

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Then release constraint and CN and save

 

Later, the CN can be removed from profile:

 

 

 

 

Works fine, on a first glance:

 

 

 

 App: CT04 (GUI-App)

 

 

However, the cstic AVC_ROBO_TYPE is still existent in the where-used list:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Now trying to cleanup:

 

When double clicking the CN AVC_RBT_CN_TEST_001_A can be displayed:

 

App: CU03 (GUI-App)

 

 

Display mode works fine

 

However, when switching to change mode…..

 

 

 

 

Then the error occurs:

 

 

How can we delete no longer needed constraint nets to ensure housekeeping?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Product Compliance - Collaboration within the supply chain - Campaign
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a question. Is there a simalar funtionality available in Public Cloud as is available in Private Cloud for "Collaboration within the supply chain - Campaign" as descibed in SAP Help

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ff6d35a34fbe4bea99e4ac41b0d5db03/43dff3ce269f453ca7940e9b2088a8a3.html?locale=en-US 

My customer want's to send messages/email to his suppliers to request article-related compliance data such as declarable substances for discrete products regarding regulatory lists as well as company-related compliance requirements.

entry.title: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'" in Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am encountering the following error while using the POST method for Purchase Order in Postman. Although I am passing all the required entities, the error persists. Additionally, the error message does not specify which segment is missing, and there is no further clarification available in the "OData Error App."

I am struggling to resolve this issue and have attached a screenshot of the error for reference. Has anyone else faced a similar issue?

Error: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'

Looking forward to any insights.

Regards

Janarthanan

meetjana@hotmail.com

entry.title: Exchange Rate Source for Journal Entries in Foreign Currency
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

When creating a journal entry with a transaction currency different from the company code currency, where does the exchange rate come from? I have noticed that there are no rates maintained in the Currency Exchange Rate app.

Could you please clarify the source of the exchange rate in this scenario?
